meta.title: Chonk — WooCommerce demo (Wonders & Oddities)
meta.description: WordPress + WooCommerce + Chonk, pre-loaded with the Wonders & Oddities sample shop and blog.
meta.author: RegionallyFamous

steps.data:
<?php
if ( ! class_exists( 'WC_Product_CSV_Importer_Controller' ) ) {
    require_once WC_ABSPATH . 'includes/admin/importers/class-wc-product-csv-importer-controller.php';
}
if ( ! class_exists( 'WC_Product_CSV_Importer' ) ) {
    require_once WC_ABSPATH . 'includes/import/class-wc-product-csv-importer.php';
}
$response = wp_remote_get(
    'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RegionallyFamous/wonders-oddities/main/wonders-oddities-products.csv',
    [ 'timeout' => 60 ]
);
$csv = wp_tempnam( 'wo-products' );
file_put_contents( $csv, wp_remote_retrieve_body( $response ) );
$fh      = fopen( $csv, 'r' );
$headers = fgetcsv( $fh );
fclose( $fh );
$mapping = WC_Product_CSV_Importer_Controller::auto_map_columns( $headers, false );
$results = ( new WC_Product_CSV_Importer( $csv, [
    'mapping'         => $mapping,
    'parse'           => true,
    'update_existing' => true,
    'delimiter'       => ',',
    'lines'           => -1,
] ) )->import();
unlink( $csv );
WP_CLI::success( 'W&O import done. Imported=' . count( $results['imported'] ) . ' Updated=' . count( $results['updated'] ) . ' Failed=' . count( $results['failed'] ) );

<?php
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';

$base = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RegionallyFamous/fifty/main/chonk/playground/images/';

function wo_attach( $url, $post_id ) {
    $id = media_sideload_image( $url, $post_id, basename( $url, '.png' ), 'id' );
    return is_wp_error( $id ) ? null : $id;
}

// Products — derive slug from SKU: WO-BOTTLED-MORNING → wonders-bottled-morning.png
$product_ids = get_posts( [ 'post_type' => 'product', 'numberposts' => -1, 'fields' => 'ids' ] );
$n = 0;
foreach ( $product_ids as $pid ) {
    $sku = get_post_meta( $pid, '_sku', true );
    if ( ! $sku || strpos( $sku, 'WO-' ) !== 0 ) continue;
    $part = strtolower( preg_replace( '/-V\d+$/', '', substr( $sku, 3 ) ) );
    $att  = wo_attach( $base . 'wonders-' . $part . '.png', $pid );
    if ( $att ) { set_post_thumbnail( $pid, $att ); $n++; }
}
WP_CLI::log( "Products: updated $n thumbnail(s)." );

// Posts — slug wonders-post-{post_name}.png
$m = 0;
foreach ( get_posts( [ 'post_type' => 'post', 'numberposts' => -1 ] ) as $p ) {
    $att = wo_attach( $base . 'wonders-post-' . $p->post_name . '.png', $p->ID );
    if ( $att ) { set_post_thumbnail( $p->ID, $att ); $m++; }
}
WP_CLI::log( "Posts: updated $m thumbnail(s)." );

// Pages — slug wonders-page-{post_name}.png
$k = 0;
foreach ( get_posts( [ 'post_type' => 'page', 'numberposts' => -1 ] ) as $p ) {
    $att = wo_attach( $base . 'wonders-page-' . $p->post_name . '.png', $p->ID );
    if ( $att ) { set_post_thumbnail( $p->ID, $att ); $k++; }
}
WP_CLI::log( "Pages: updated $k thumbnail(s)." );

WP_CLI::success( 'Chonk image patch complete.' );

steps.command: wp option update show_on_front page && wp option update page_on_front $(wp post list --post_type=page --name=home --field=ids) && wp option update page_for_posts $(wp post list --post_type=page --name=journal --field=ids)
wp menu location assign main-navigation primary || true; wp menu location assign footer-navigation footer || true
